name: oss-thanks
description: Auto-star GitHub repositories used by AI coding agents, or queue them for review based on the user's saved preference.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-star OSS projects used by agents
interface.longDescription: Record GitHub repositories referenced, cloned, or downloaded by AI coding agents. On first use, ask the user whether to auto-star immediately or review at the end, then remember that choice for future runs.
defaultPrompt: Ask how OSS Thanks should run, then remember my choice
Auto-star GitHub projects used in this task
Show the OSS Thanks review queue
